hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx) npx tsc --noEmit "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -3 || true ;; *.py) python3 -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>&1 || true ;; *.js|*.jsx|*.mjs) node --check "$FILE" 2>&1 || true ;; *.rs) echo 'Rust: run cargo check after all edits' ;; *.go) gofmt -e "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -3 || true ;; esac; fi

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx) npx tsc --noEmit "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -3 || true ;; *.py) python3 -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>&1 || true ;; *.js|*.jsx|*.mjs) node --check "$FILE" 2>&1 || true ;; esac; fi
